title: Shenyang, Liaoning — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Shenyang, Liaoning: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Shenyang is a city in Liaoning with a population of 9,070,000. The largest city in northeastern China, a former imperial capital with Manchu heritage and a heavy industrial past transforming into a service economy.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
